label: A_TIMELY
reason: ANB customs exit record shows 22:41 on 2026-04-05; SUNAT gate record confirms 23:12 on 2026-04-05. Both timestamps before the 23:59 deadline. Shipment was timely.

label: B_LATE
reason: ANB customs exit record shows 02:15 on 2026-04-06; SUNAT gate record confirms 02:47 on 2026-04-06. Both timestamps after the 23:59 deadline. Shipment was late.

label: C_UNDETERMINED
reason: ANB exit record shows 23:52 on 2026-04-05 (8 min before deadline) but SUNAT gate record has illegible timestamp and truck plate mismatch (8834-FMX ≠ 2291-AKL). Evidence insufficient to confirm timely crossing.
